qas.q: What is the SupO job description?
qas.a:
A Ground Supply Officer is a special staff to the Commanding Officer

Manage unit property records (electronic records match the physical counts)

Fiscal officer for the unit bank account

Supervise procurement of all requests for supplies

3002: Ground Supply Officer (O-1 thru O-5)

3010: Ground Supply Operations Officer (WO thru CWO5)

3043: Supply Chain and Material Management Specialist/Admin Section (E1 thru E9)

3051: Inventory Management Specialist/Warehouse Section (E1 thru E9)

qas.q: What are the two major inventory levels of supply within the USMC?
What subcategories of inventory are involved in Retail Inventory?
What is a Using Unit account?
qas.a:
a consumer-level supply activity holding a consumer level of inventory.

Most TBS graduates will be in charge of a Using Unit account.

qas.q: What is the Common Structure for a Using Unit account?
qas.a:
Supply Officer(3002)

Supply Chief(3043) Inventory Chief(3051)

Property Inventory MGMT
Requisition MGMT Personal Effects
Fiscal and Procurement
The senior 3043 assigned to the using unit account and their day to day management of the Marines in the supply process.
The senior 3051 who oversees inventory management and the Marines who work in the warehouses.

qas.q: What is the purpose of the Global Combat Support System-Marine Corps (GCSS-MC)?
qas.a:
the official accounting system for the Marine Corps

Access granted from the G-8 comptroller

qas.q: What is the purpose of the Standard, Accounting, Budgeting, and Reporting System (SABRS)?
qas.a:
This tool allows you to view your unit's bank account

Access granted from the G-8 comptroller

qas.q: What is the purpose of the SABRS Management Analysis Retrieval System Tool (SMARTS)?
qas.a:
the system used to submit contracts and can be used for general purchase requests outside of the GCSS-MC

Access granted by UUAM in PR-Builder or G-4

qas.q: What is the purpose of the Purchase Request Builder (PR-Builder)?
qas.a:
system that allows units to execute travel for training, conferences, site surveys.

vital for keeping tabs on funding

qas.q: What is the purpose of the Defense Travel System (DTS)?
qas.a:
A system that keeps track of all Small Arms in the USMC

SupO and chiefs need access to approve incoming and outgoing small arms shipments

Access granted through CRANE personnel.

qas.q: What is the purpose of the CRANE portal?
qas.a:
the portal for all things related to the Defense Logistics Agency

includes DLA disposition services and viewing fuel transactions

qas.q: What is the purpose of the Defense Logistics Agency-Account Management and Provisioning System (AMPS)?
qas.a: The information management system used to pass pertinent information as well as a place to store important files.

qas.q: What is the purpose of SharePoint?
qas.a:
a website used to build shopping carts and procure administrative supplies for your unit.

Account requests are processed online.

qas.q: What is the purpose of Servmart Online?
qas.a:
allows you to research technical information on products and utilize online procurement.

Provides access to Federal Logistics information

qas.q: What is the purpose of FEDMALL?

qas.a: Information Technology Procurement Request Review/Approval System
Military Standard Requisitioning and Issue Procedures
Standard Accounting, Budgeting and Reporting System
SABRS Management Analysis Retrieval System Tool
Table of Authorized Material Control Number
